decision: Use OAuth2 instead of custom auth
why: Custom auth is a security liability and 3x the development time for no user benefit

alternatives.rejected_because: Security risk, password storage liability, maintenance burden
Poor UX for frequent users who log in daily

chosen_direction: OAuth2 with Google + GitHub providers — covers 90% of developer users
proof_action: Get Google OAuth working in dev by end of week

why: Onboarding wizard is 2 weeks of work for a feature nobody will see until we have users. Ship faster.

alternatives.rejected_because: Delays launch by 2 weeks, might not match real user needs
First-time users will be confused without any guidance

chosen_direction: Empty state with a getting-started card — 2 hours instead of 2 weeks
proof_action: Build the getting-started card component this session
